steps.t: Head toward the Isendeep mine, and in the shadow of the entrance find the Eagle Golloval. Ask the eagle if he might know how to enhance the mood of th…
Golloval needs a glass bauble to capture a ray of the sun. He tasked you with trying to collect one from the goblins in Grothum, the Warg dens in the …
You received the infused bauble from Golloval and were advised to return the bauble to the cultivator at Glan Vraig.
